nasb.text: Thus says the Lord: “Behold, I am going to arouse against Babylon And against the inhabitants of Leb-kamai The spirit of a destroyer.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “Behold, I will stir up the spirit of a destroyer against Babylon, against the inhabitants of Leb-kamai,

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “看哪！我必激動毀滅者的心， 去攻擊巴比倫和住在立加米的人。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “看啊，我要使毁灭的暴风袭击巴比伦和住在立加米的人。
